pageHero.title: About Shwe Myanmar
pageHero.subtitle: Mandalay heritage, natural ingredients, and trusted quality — သဘာဝ အနံ့ သဘာဝ အရသာ since day one.

aboutStory.title: Shwe Myanmar Foodstuff Industry
paragraphs: Shwe Myanmar (ရွှေမြန်မာ) is a registered trademark of Shwe Myanmar Foodstuff Industry, proudly based in Mandalay, Myanmar. We specialize in premium butter (ထောပတ်) and ghee (နွားချဉ်ထောပတ်) for households, restaurants, and commercial kitchens nationwide.

Our motto — သဘာဝ အနံ့ သဘာဝ အရသာ (Natural scent, natural taste) — reflects our commitment to authentic flavor using carefully selected natural ingredients and traditional craftsmanship combined with modern quality standards.
From our 1 Viss retail packs to our flagship 10 Viss bulk size, we offer options for every kitchen and every business.

milestones.title: Mandalay Origins
milestones.text: Shwe Myanmar Foodstuff Industry established in Mandalay, bringing traditional butter-making heritage to modern production.

milestones.title: Nationwide Distribution
milestones.text: Expanded distribution across Myanmar — Mandalay, Yangon, Sagaing, Shan, and Magway regions.

milestones.title: 10 Viss Bulk Launch
milestones.text: Introduced our flagship 10 Viss (≈16.33 kg) bulk pack for wholesale and commercial customers.

values.title: Natural Quality
values.text: Carefully selected ingredients for authentic butter and ghee flavor.

values.title: Consistency
values.text: Every batch meets strict quality standards from our Mandalay facility.

values.title: Accessibility
values.text: Premium products at fair prices for families and businesses alike.

contact.formDesc: Fill out the form below and our team will respond as soon as possible. For urgent orders, please call our hotline directly.

pageHero.title: Privacy Policy & Terms
pageHero.subtitle: How we handle your information and the terms governing use of our website.

sections.title: Privacy Policy
paragraphs: Shwe Myanmar Foodstuff Industry respects your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect information when you visit our website or contact us.
We may collect your name, phone number, email address, and message content when you submit a contact or wholesale inquiry form. This information is used solely to respond to your request.
list: We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
Form data in this demo site is not stored — production will use secure server-side storage.
You may request deletion of your data by contacting us at 095-2-55122.

sections.title: Terms of Use
paragraphs: By using this website, you agree to these terms. Content on this site is for informational purposes about Shwe Myanmar products and services.
Product images and prices shown are subject to change. Final pricing is confirmed at the time of order via phone or authorized distributor.

sections.title: Cookies & Analytics
paragraphs: We may use cookies to improve site performance and understand visitor behavior. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.
When migrated to WordPress, analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics) may be enabled with appropriate consent mechanisms.

pageHero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
pageHero.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Shwe Myanmar butter, ghee, ordering, and storage.

items.question: What products does Shwe Myanmar Foodstuff Industry make?
items.answer: We specialize in premium butter (ထောပတ်) and ghee under the Shwe Myanmar (ရွှေမြန်မာ) brand. Our flagship product is available in multiple sizes including the 10 Viss bulk pack (≈ 16.33 kg).

items.question: What does '10 Viss' mean?
items.answer: Viss is a traditional Burmese unit of weight. 10 Viss equals approximately 16.33 kg (36 lbs). Our 10 Viss pack is designed for wholesale, restaurants, and commercial kitchens.

items.question: How can I place an order?
items.answer: Contact us by phone: 095-2-55122, 095-2-55123, or 095-9-200 1227. Our team in Mandalay will assist with retail and wholesale orders.

items.question: Where is Shwe Myanmar produced?
items.answer: All Shwe Myanmar butter and ghee products are produced by Shwe Myanmar Foodstuff Industry in Mandalay, Myanmar.

items.question: How should I store butter and ghee?
items.answer: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Once opened, refrigerate and use within the recommended period printed on the packaging.

items.question: Do you offer wholesale and distribution?
items.answer: Yes. We welcome wholesale orders and distributor partnerships. Visit our Wholesale page or call 095-2-55122 for bulk pricing on 10 Viss and larger packs.

pageHero.title: Quality Standards
pageHero.subtitle: သဘာဝ အနံ့ သဘာဝ အရသာ — every pack meets strict standards from our Mandalay production facility.

quality.title: Natural Quality, Every Batch
paragraphs: At Shwe Myanmar Foodstuff Industry, quality is not an afterthought — it is the foundation of everything we produce. From raw ingredient selection to final packaging, every step is monitored to deliver consistent butter and ghee.

Our Mandalay facility follows strict hygiene and production standards. Each batch is tested for flavor, texture, and freshness before it reaches your kitchen — whether you are a home cook or a commercial kitchen.
quality.imageAlt: Quality control at Shwe Myanmar Mandalay facility

steps.title: Ingredient Selection
steps.text: Carefully selected natural ingredients sourced for authentic butter and ghee flavor.

steps.title: Production Monitoring
steps.text: Every stage of production is supervised at our Mandalay facility with strict hygiene protocols.

steps.title: Batch Testing
steps.text: Each batch is tested for taste, texture, and freshness before packaging.

steps.title: Safe Packaging
steps.text: Products are sealed in food-grade packaging with clear labeling and storage guidance.

standards.title: Natural Ingredients
standards.text: No artificial flavoring — authentic natural scent and natural taste in every pack.

standards.title: Consistent Batch Quality
standards.text: Same great taste from the first pack to the last, whether retail or 10 Viss bulk.

standards.title: Hygienic Production
standards.text: Modern equipment and clean-room practices at our Mandalay production facility.

standards.title: Clear Labeling
standards.text: Full product information, storage instructions, and batch traceability on every pack.

standards.title: Registered Trademark
standards.text: Shwe Myanmar (ရွှေမြန်မာ) is a registered trademark — buy with confidence.

standards.title: Customer Support
standards.text: Questions about quality? Call our hotline at 095-2-55122 — we are here to help.

Products are available in major regions. For wholesale and bulk orders (10 Viss packs), contact our Mandalay office directly.

regions.name: Other Regions

We are always interested in hearing from talented individuals who share our commitment to natural ingredients and consistent quality.

pageHero.title: Accessibility Statement
pageHero.subtitle: Our commitment to making the Shwe Myanmar website usable for as many visitors as possible.

sections.title: Our Commitment
paragraphs: Shwe Myanmar Foodstuff Industry is committed to improving the accessibility of our website. We aim to provide an inclusive experience for all visitors, including people with disabilities.
Accessibility is an ongoing effort. We welcome feedback to help us identify areas for improvement.

sections.title: Website Accessibility Features
paragraphs: The following features are implemented across our site:
list: Skip-to-content link on every page for keyboard and screen reader users.
Semantic HTML structure with headings, landmarks, and descriptive labels.
ARIA attributes on interactive components such as accordions and navigation.
Responsive layout that adapts to different screen sizes and zoom levels.
Alternative text on product and content images where applicable.

sections.title: Known Limitations & Ongoing Work
paragraphs: Some third-party content (such as external images) may not fully meet accessibility standards. We are working to review and improve contrast, focus indicators, and screen reader compatibility as the site evolves.
When this site is migrated to WordPress, we plan to conduct a formal accessibility audit and address any remaining gaps.

sections.title: Feedback & Contact
paragraphs: If you encounter accessibility barriers on our website, please let us know. We will do our best to provide the information you need in an alternative format.
Contact our customer hotline at 095-2-55122 or 095-9-200 1227, or visit our Contact page to send a message.
